parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: inline lists dictionaries comments and quoted scalars
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
# top-level comments are ignored
flags: [onlyStrict, "raw # value", false, null, 'it''s'] # trailing comment
features: [BigInt, class-fields-private]
negative: { phase: parse, type: SyntaxError, note: "colon: stays" }
description: "line\nwith\ttab and \"quote\""
esid: 'sec-example'
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: block lists dictionaries and empty keys
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
includes:
  - sta.js
  - assert.js
features:
  - BigInt
  - "class-fields-private"
negative:
  phase: runtime
  type: TypeError
emptyKey:
not yaml metadata
---*/

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: literal and folded block scalars
parse_yaml_frontmatter.source:
/*---
info: |
  first line
  second line

  next paragraph
summary: >
  folded line
  continues

  next paragraph
---*/

expected.info:
first line
second line

next paragraph

parse_yaml_frontmatter.name: comment stripping respects quotes and nesting
